title: syringa fauriei var. lactea
intro: Syringa fauriei var. lactea, also known as the white Korean lilac, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of Korea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Syringa fauriei var. lactea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
